Initializer# init(jsValueRef:in:)

iOS 16.0+iPadOS 16.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
init!(
    jsValueRef value: JSValueRef!,
    in context: JSContext!
)
```

## [Return Value](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue/init(jsValueRef:in:)#return-value)

The Objective-C API equivalent of the specified JSValueRef.

## [Discussion](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue/init(jsValueRef:in:)#discussion)

Creates a JSValue, wrapping its C API counterpart.
